content: We can reframe Self-Refine's single-perspective iterative improvement pipeline as an incomplete self-reflection mechanism, and boost its performance by integrating multiple inconsistent solving perspectives from recent LLM self-reflection research to create Multi-Perspective Self-Refine, a framework that retains Self-Refine's key advantage of no extra training or supervised data while unlocking higher output quality. This hybrid framework fixes a blind spot of original Self-Refine: it can get stuck in local optima when the LLM only critiques its own output from the same initial reasoning perspective it used to generate the output.
